title: PM Work Identity ORM Alignment
objective: Align the PM/work SQLAlchemy and read-schema layer to the six now-active identity foreign keys by adding minimal identity models, relationship declarations, and bounded regression coverage without changing database schema or opening broader write-side runtime implementation.
constrained_outputs: Minimal identity SQLAlchemy models for users, employees, and crews
Relationship declarations on WorkPackage, Assignment, ExecutionIssue, and ProgressSnapshot for the six active identity foreign keys
Bounded read-schema or serialization updates needed for identity-backed read alignment
No database-schema changes and no broader write-side runtime implementation
validation_steps: Confirm the ORM layer reflects only the six active identity foreign keys from packet 012d and introduces only the minimum identity models and relationships needed for alignment
Confirm no database schema changes are made and packet 012e does not re-open FK activation or broader write-side API implementation
Confirm packet-010a model tests, packet-010b API tests, and packet-011f project-write tests still pass with the aligned identity ORM layer
Confirm the resulting runtime layer is ready for later identity-backed read or write follow-on work with identity relationships available
sql_permission_note: Packet 012e is runtime-layer alignment only. The six identity foreign keys are already active. No new SQL or schema changes are authorized.
